Resources 📚

Master the tools of the future.

New to Skills?

Everything you need to get started. Welcome to our comprehensive learning hub.

What are Skills?

Learn what agent skills are and how they can supercharge your workflow. A skill is a modular set of instructions that allows an AI to perform specific legal tasks...

Skills vs MCP

Understand the difference between skills and MCP servers. One is about action, the other is about connection.

Getting Started

Install your first skill in under 2 minutes. Follow our quick-start guide to get your first agent running.

Create a Skill

Step-by-step guide to building and sharing your own skills. Join the community and contribute to the registry.
